title: VOIDBORN
tagline: Between light and oblivion, one child holds the fracture shut.
synopsis: In a world where the boundary between realms has begun to crack, a boy born with no shadow discovers he alone can hear the voices leaking through. Part cosmic horror, part coming-of-age — VOIDBORN is a manga about the weight of being chosen, and the cost of staying human.

author.name: Aryan
author.bio: Self-taught artist and storyteller from New Delhi. VOIDBORN began as a sketch in a college notebook and grew into something I couldn't stop thinking about. I update every Friday — no exceptions.

announcement: Chapter 3 is now live — the fracture speaks for the first time.

seo.description: VOIDBORN — A dark fantasy manga about a boy born with no shadow, discovering he's the only barrier between worlds. New chapters every Friday.
seo.keywords: manga, dark fantasy, voidborn, webcomic, cosmic horror, free manga online

worldBuilding.definition: A growing tear in the membrane separating the living world from the Void — first appeared 12 years ago, the night Kai was born.
Extremely rare individuals born during a Fracture event. They inherit the Void's resonance — and its hunger.
Ancient entities that chose imprisonment over destruction. They whisper through the Fracture, patient and deliberate.
A Voidborn without a shadow — considered an omen. Kai is the only known Shadowless in recorded history.

faq.q: When does a new chapter release?
faq.a: Every Friday at midnight IST. Subscribe to the newsletter for release notifications.
Yes, completely free — always. No paywalls, no premium tiers.
The first arc is 24 chapters. Beyond that — the Void decides.

faq.q: Can I share VOIDBORN with friends?
faq.a: Please do. Sharing is the only algorithm that works for indie creators.
